lines.english: Hello, may I ask, is Teacher Chang in?
This is she. Who are you?
Teacher, hello. I am Li You.
Teacher, do you have time this afternoon? I would like to ask you a few questions.
I'm sorry, I have a meeting this afternoon.
Tomorrow morning I have two classes, and at three in the afternoon I have to give an exam to the second-year class.
When will you have free time?
I won't have free time until after four o'clock tomorrow.
If it's convenient for you, I'll go to your office at 4:30, is that okay?
4:30, no problem. I'll wait for you in my office.

example_sentence.py: Tā gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà.

example_sentence.cn: 我昨天很忙，没给妈妈打电话。
example_sentence.py: Wǒ zuótiān hěn máng, méi gěi māma dǎ diànhuà.
example_sentence.en: I was very busy yesterday. I didn't call my mother.

example_sentence.py: Tā gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà.

vocabulary.definition: to be present, to be at (a place)

example_sentence.cn: 明天下午三点我要给二年级考试。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān xiàwù sān diǎn wǒ yào gěi èr niánjí kǎo shì.
example_sentence.en: I'm going to give the second-year class a test at 3:00 p.m. tomorrow.

example_sentence.py: Wǒ wèn tā yí ge wèntí

vocabulary.definition: will, to be going to, to want to, to have a desire to [See Grammar 2.]

example_sentence.py: Míngtiān wǒ bú qù Xiǎo Bái jiā wánr, wǒ yào kāi huì.
example_sentence.en: I'm not going to visit Little Bai tomorrow. I am going to a meeting.

vocabulary.definition: to open, to hold (a meeting, party, etc.)

database_items.original_pinyin: wèi qǐngwèn cháng lǎoshī zài ma
standard_answers: Hello, may I ask, is Teacher Chang in?

database_items.original_text: 老师,今天下午您有时间吗？
database_items.original_pinyin: lǎo shī jīn tiān xià wǔ nín yǒu shí jiān ma
standard_answers: Teacher, do you have time this afternoon?

database_items.original_pinyin: nín shén me shí hou yǒu kòngr
standard_answers: When will you have free time?

database_items.original_text: 要是您方便,四点半我到您的办公室去,行吗？
database_items.original_pinyin: yào shi nín fāng biàn sì diǎn bàn wǒ dào nín de bàn gōng shì qù xíng ma
standard_answers: If it's convenient for you, I'll go to your office at 4:30, is that okay?

standard_answers: 没问题。我在办公室等你。

video_global_config.visual_style: 3D Pixar animation style, cinematic, vibrant colors, soft and warm lighting, detailed textures, friendly and educational atmosphere.

character_definitions.name: 常老师
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A kind and professional Chinese female teacher in her late 30s, named Chang Laoshi. She has shoulder-length dark brown hair tied in a neat bun, wears stylish rectangular glasses. Dressed in a smart-casual light blue blouse and a grey cardigan. Her expressions are warm and patient.

character_definitions.name: 李友
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A curious and polite female Chinese university student in her early 20s, named Li You. She has long black hair, often worn in a simple ponytail. Dressed in a comfortable yellow hoodie and jeans. Her expressions are bright, respectful, and eager to learn.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 开场分镜：李友在她的大学宿舍里打电话，表情礼貌而略带紧张。画面采用分屏，另一半显示常老师在她明亮整洁的办公室里接起电话。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Split screen, 3D Pixar animation style. On the left, Li You, a young female student with a ponytail and a yellow hoodie, is in her cozy university dorm room, holding a smartphone to her ear with a polite expression. On the right, Chang Laoshi, a kind-looking female teacher with glasses and a blue blouse, is in her bright, book-lined office, answering her desk phone. Cinematic, soft lighting.

voice_over.content: 喂, 请问, 常老师在吗？
voice_over.pinyin: wèi, qǐngwèn, cháng lǎoshī zài ma?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 常老师看着电脑屏幕上的日历，上面清晰地标着“下午：会议”。她带着歉意的表情对着电话说话。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Medium close-up shot of Chang Laoshi in her office, 3D Pixar style. She is looking at her computer monitor with an apologetic smile. The screen displays a digital calendar with a prominent event block labeled '会议' for the afternoon. The office is filled with warm light from a window. Cinematic depth of field.

voice_over.content: 对不起, 今天下午我要开会。
voice_over.pinyin: duìbuqǐ, jīntiān xiàwǔ wǒ yào kāihuì.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 一个快速的蒙太奇画面，展示常老师繁忙的日程：她先是在一间教室里给学生上课，然后镜头切换到她在另一间教室里给二年级学生监考。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Dynamic montage sequence, 3D Pixar animation style. First shot: Chang Laoshi enthusiastically teaching in front of a whiteboard in a classroom full of students. Quick cut to the second shot: Chang Laoshi walking between desks in a quiet classroom where younger students (second-graders) are focused on an exam. Energetic and cinematic.

voice_over.content: 明天上午我有两节课, 下午三点要给二年级考试。
voice_over.pinyin: míngtiān shàngwǔ wǒ yǒu liǎng jié kè, xiàwǔ sān diǎn yào gěi èr niánjí kǎoshì.

screen_overlay.main_text: 上午 (shàngwǔ) 有课 (yǒu kè) / 下午 (xiàwǔ) 考试 (kǎoshì)
screen_overlay.sub_text: have class in the morning / have an exam in the afternoon

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 镜头切回李友，她正低头看自己的日程本，然后抬起头，带着期盼的眼神询问老师何时有空。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Medium shot of Li You back in her dorm room, 3D Pixar style. She looks down at a physical planner on her desk, then looks up towards the camera (as if looking at the teacher) with a hopeful and questioning expression. Her room has posters and books in the background. Soft, natural lighting from the window.

screen_overlay.sub_text: When will you have free time?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 常老师微笑着，看了一眼办公室墙上的时钟，时钟指针刚过四点。她轻松地给出了一个确切的时间。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Close-up on Chang Laoshi's smiling face, 3D Pixar style. She glances to her side. The camera follows her gaze, panning to a simple, elegant wall clock in her office showing the time as 4:10 PM. She looks back, nodding reassuringly. Warm, late-afternoon light streams into the office.

voice_over.content: 明天四点以后才有空儿。
voice_over.pinyin: míngtiān sì diǎn yǐhòu cái yǒu kòngr.

screen_overlay.main_text: 四点以后 (sì diǎn yǐhòu) 才有空儿 (cái yǒu kòngr)
screen_overlay.sub_text: won't have free time until after 4 o'clock

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 最后的确认画面：再次分屏，李友和常老师都微笑着点头，达成约定。李友在宿舍里开心地记下笔记，常老师在办公室里也露出了期待的微笑。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Final scene in split screen, 3D Pixar animation style. On the left, Li You is smiling brightly, jotting down a note in her planner. On the right, Chang Laoshi is also smiling warmly and nodding in agreement. Both characters look pleased, conveying a successful arrangement. The lighting is optimistic and bright. Cinematic.

voice_over.content: 没问题。我在办公室等你。
voice_over.pinyin: méi wèntí. wǒ zài bàngōngshì děng nǐ.

screen_overlay.main_text: 没问题 (méi wèntí) / 办公室 (bàngōngshì)
